title: Marketplace
snippet:
@@ -21,3 @@ (20 before, 0 after)

The Marketplace concept describes two distinct marketplaces that share the same codebase. The public "compile-then-govern" umbrella is for outsiders, offering self-hosted, curated-only read-only access. The private "intent-solutions-io" catalog is for internal company tools. title: claude-code-plugins
snippet:
@@ -21,3 @@ (20 before, 0 after)

The claude-code-plugins project has approximately 2,300 stars, 300+ forks, and 45k+ npm downloads. It is considered the product proof, not the spine. Calling the spine the "first" product would erase the plugins hub.
